license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.iiyccfw
title: Bacteriophage Cryopreservation
author: Dr. Steven Wilhelm

steps_raw.instruction: Vortex a freshly lysed culture for 10 sec 00:00:10
Add 1 mL of phage into each cryogenic vial undetermined
Add 1 mL of 20% glycerol to each vial with phage undetermined Glycerol growcells.com Catalog #MRGE-4002
Remove cryogenic vials one at a time from the freezer
Using a sterile pipette tip, scrape a small amount of frozen virus particles into a 20 mL mid-log culture
Place cryogenic vials immediately back into the freezer
Allow to incubate and lyse culture under constant light conditions appropriate for your specific culture
